name: Generic Chili Recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil (choose a low-smoke type) in a heavy pot over medium-high heat.
2. Add meat, onion, and garlic. Cook until browned.
3. Stir in cumin, chili powder, salt, and pepper.
4. Coarsely chop tomatoes and add to meat along with juice.
5. Stir in beer.
6. Simmer uncovered for 1-2 hours, adding more beer or water as needed.
If chili meat is unavailable, use stew or soup meat.
Some prefer a flat beer instead of fresh beer.
Enjoy!
